title: plectranthus shikokianus
intro: Plectranthus shikokianus is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, native to Japan and known for its fragrant leaves and purple flowers. The leaves of the Plectranthus shikokianus plant have been used in traditional medicine, particularly in Japan, for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and acting as an antioxidant. The leaves can be prepared as a tea or used in herbal infusions, often in combination with other herbs, to leverage its medicinal properties and health benefits.
